title: feat(sonic): add support for nova sonic
summary: Adds a new @mastra/voice-aws-nova-sonic package under voice/aws-nova-sonic/ implementing bidirectional real-time voice streaming with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic via the AWS Bedrock Runtime SDK. Includes a full Next.js example app (examples/voice/aws-nova-sonic-test/) with browser-based UI for testing voice conversations. The main implementation is ~2400 lines with 839 lines of unit tests using mocked AWS SDK. The package supports features like speaker selection (18 voices), endpointing sensitivity control, barge-in, and SSE-based live event streaming.
maintainerNotes: External community contribution addressing issue #5901. The PR has merge conflicts that need resolving. CI checks are stuck in PENDING (common for external contributor PRs needing workflow approval). No changeset was added (flagged by changeset-bot). CodeRabbit flagged that the example path is hardcoded in pnpm-workspace.yaml instead of using a glob pattern. The main source file (index.ts) is very large (~2400 lines) and may benefit from being split up. All author commits are from Feb 19; the Mar 6 update timestamp likely reflects an automated re-check. No maintainer has reviewed yet — only CodeRabbit bot comments exist. The author has been responsive to CodeRabbit feedback, iterating through multiple 'addressing comments' commits. Worth a maintainer review given it fills a requested feature gap for AWS voice support.
